query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN applicationProcess IS NOT NULL AND applicationProcess != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_applicationProcess,
  SUM(CASE WHEN deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_deadline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN targetDiagnosis IS NOT NULL AND targetDiagnosis != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_targetDiagnosis,
  SUM(CASE WHEN documentsRequired IS NOT NULL AND documentsRequired != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_documentsRequired,
  SUM(CASE WHEN geographicScope IS NOT NULL AND geographicScope != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_geographicScope,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ageRange IS NOT NULL AND ageRange != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_ageRange,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fundingType IS NOT NULL AND fundingType != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fundingType,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description,
  SUM(CASE WHEN eligibility IS NOT NULL AND eligibility != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_eligibility
FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;
